pages.text: The $(5)Speed Module$() can be placed in the upgrade slots of various machines to upgrade their performance. Examples include: $(li)Speeding up force field projection$(li)Increasing the $(l:getting_started/fortron)Fortron$() transfer limit of a $(l:machines/fortron_capacitor)Fortron Capacitor$()$(li)Increasing the output of a $(l:machines/coercion_deriver)Coercion Deriver$()
